title: VALUES multiple inserts error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_data(id Int32, value String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
CREATE TABLE test_multiples(count_all Int32, count_distinct Int32);
INSERT INTO test_multiples SELECT COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT value) FROM test_data;
INSERT INTO test_multiples SELECT COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT id) FROM test_data;
key_bug_features: INSERT with SELECT from multiple rows causes error
